features.name: visitors
features.notes: Pilot migration — spec 014. Includes all 10 components, 10 hooks, and shared primitives (image-capture, vehicle-form, visit-person-status-select, resident-select).

features.name: tenant-selector
features.notes: Spec 020. TenantSelector Popover+Command combobox — TopBar picker for multi-tenant admin/guard users. No next/*, no 'use client', i18n and transport adapter-injected.

sharedPrimitives.name: vehicle-brand-model
sharedPrimitives.notes: Spec 016. VehicleBrandSelect, VehicleModelSelect, VehicleYearInput — Mexico-market dataset, zero runtime I/O.

sharedPrimitives.name: vehicle-brand-logos
sharedPrimitives.notes: Spec 022. <VehicleBrandLogo /> + getBrandLogoUrl + frozen registry over 20 bundled SVGs. Zero runtime I/O.

sharedPrimitives.name: access-event-feedback
sharedPrimitives.notes: Spec 023. Centered, animated success/error overlay for access-event creation. Replaces corner Sonner toast at all 7 access-event-create call sites. No next/*, no "use client", no window.electron — uses i18n adapter and Radix Dialog primitives from @ramcar/ui.
